expectations.text: The workflow launches multiple code-explorer subagents with distinct lenses before writing the PRD.
expectations.evidence: Exploration summary has 4 code-explorer/agent/lens markers. Found 42 source/file mentions in exploration summary.

expectations.text: The workflow performs targeted research from official sources before recording implementation decisions.
expectations.evidence: Research summary has 33 links, 79 lines, official-source marker=True.

expectations.text: The workflow asks one user question at a time and includes a recommended answer for each question.
expectations.evidence: Interview log has 10 question markers, 32 recommendation/assumption markers, sequential order=True.

expectations.text: The final PRD follows the required template and includes a GitHub issue title/body plus the intended gh issue create command for offline filing.
expectations.evidence: Heading order valid=True; issue title present=True; gh issue create command present=True.

expectations.text: Implementation decisions cite durable codebase patterns or official research links without including specific file paths.
expectations.evidence: Research summary has 33 links, 79 lines, official-source marker=True.

workarounds: Offline benchmark: real GitHub issue creation was intentionally replaced by saved issue title/body and intended gh issue create command.
